title: Momentum vs. Drift
concept: Two moves of identical size and duration are opposite trades: momentum is initiative participation displacing price through liquidity, drift is price sliding through a vacuum. The distinction is not slope or distance, it is whether new money is paying up to move the market.
teaching_objective: Classify a directional move as momentum or drift from volume per unit of price, delta alignment, and book behavior, not from chart slope or distance, before applying any continuation tactic.
junior_error: Seeing the same 60 points on both charts and treating them identically: buying the lunch 'breakout' with full size because the price shape matches the morning move that worked.
professional_read: Momentum shows heavy volume with range expansion, sustained one-sided delta, dips bought within seconds, and offers consumed then reloading thinner. Drift shows small overlapping bars on shrinking volume, flat or trivial delta, a thin book on both sides, and a glide with no pullbacks.
decision_consequence: Momentum authorizes continuation tactics at full size. Drift authorizes no continuation; it is mean-reversion fuel that the first real opposing flow returns to the drift origin in one leg.

required_evidence.label: Volume signature: heavy with range expansion vs small bars on shrinking volume
Delta: sustained one-sided vs flat, mixed, or trivial
Book: consumed and reloading thinner vs thin on both sides
Pullbacks: bought or sold quickly vs no pullbacks, a glide
Tape: clustered large prints and speed vs minimum-size dribbles

forbidden_errors.description: Do not imply momentum and drift are distinguishable by slope, distance, or chart shape; they look identical on a candle chart.
Do not depict a full-size continuation trade on drift as correct; drift dies on first contact with real flow.
Do not show a short-covering burst as initiative demand.
Do not imply price movement equals money or participation moving.

panels.title: Two upward moves, both 60 points, both ~40 minutes (shared scale)
Volume and delta under the move (toggles: momentum / drift)
Book depth at the working level

sequence.caption: Momentum: 09:52 break of the overnight high at 21,540, breakout bar volume triple the prior bar, cumulative delta sharply positive and held, every 2-3 point dip bought, offers consumed and reloading thinner.

Drift: 12:25 creep from 21,560 to 21,620 in small overlapping bars, total volume below that single 09:52 breakout bar, flat delta, 3-4 lot quotes where the morning showed 30-lots. First real sell program unwinds it to origin in nine minutes.

annotations.text: Same 60 points, same duration. Distance and slope cannot classify participation.
Drift state: first opposing flow returns price to the drift origin in one leg.

fixture.description: Two NQ upward moves of identical 60-point size and ~40-minute duration. MOMENTUM: starts 09:52 out of a tested opening low, breaks the overnight high 21,540, breakout 5-minute bar volume triple the prior bar, cumulative delta sharply positive and sustained, 2-3 point dips bought within seconds, offers consumed and reloading thinner. DRIFT: starts 12:25, creeps 21,560 to 21,620 in small overlapping bars, total volume across the whole move below the single 09:52 breakout bar, flat delta, DOM showing 3-4 lot quotes versus 30-lots in the morning, then a single sell program at 13:40 unwinds the move to its origin in nine minutes.
fixture.notes: Static teaching fixture, bounded volume/delta/DOM counts, renders in SVG without Canvas. The toggle exposes exactly two participation states over an identical-distance move.

acceptance_criteria: Both moves render at identical distance and duration, so the comparison isolates participation, not chart shape.
All five evidence items are drawn for each state with opposing values.
The momentum state shows a consumed and reloading book with sustained delta and bought dips; the drift state shows a thin book, flat delta, and no pullbacks.
The figure never depicts slope or distance as the classifier.
The drift state shows reversion to the drift origin as the consequence; the momentum state shows continuation.
The toggle switches between exactly two states, not more.
